name: LA Familia Pawn and Jewelry
description_short: Kissimmee's LA Familia Pawn and Jewelry at 3615 W Vine St provides quick cash loans and jewelry sales for local residents.
description_long:
LA Familia Pawn and Jewelry is located at 3615 W Vine Street in Kissimmee, FL, serving the community with convenient access from major roads. The shop is a standalone location offering pawn services, jewelry sales, and quick cash loans. Hours of operation are Monday through Friday 9 AM to 7 PM, Saturday 9 AM to 6 PM, and closed on Sundays.

At this Kissimmee location, you can buy and sell jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and other valuables. Whether you need a quick loan against personal items or want to sell unwanted jewelry, the knowledgeable staff at 3615 W Vine can help. Call 407-483-5879 to ask about current offers or to bring in items for evaluation.

For Kissimmee residents needing fast cash or a second opinion on jewelry value, LA Familia Pawn and Jewelry provides an alternative to traditional banks. Bring valid ID and the items you'd like to pawn or sell. The shop has built a reputation in the area for fair dealing and straightforward pricing.
pros: Free layaway program with only 10% down — competitors in FL and AR charge for this
Loyalty rewards program that earns points on both loan payments and purchases
Mobile app for loan tracking and remote payments
Protection plans available on used merchandise purchases
Bilingual service (English and Spanish) catering to Spanish-speaking customers
Multi-state presence (FL, AR, Puerto Rico) with multiple store locations
Founded 2009 — established chain with over 15 years of operation
cons: Pawn loan interest rates are not disclosed on the website — typically very high (state-regulated but often 20%+ per month)
No online loan application — must visit a physical store to obtain a loan
Limited geographic footprint (Florida, Arkansas, Puerto Rico only)
Loan amounts depend entirely on the broker's appraisal of your item, which can feel subjective
Selling items outright typically yields far below market value, as with all pawn shops
best_for: Consumers who need fast cash and own valuables but have poor or no credit
Spanish-speaking customers who prefer bilingual service
Shoppers looking for discounted used electronics, jewelry, tools, or firearms
Short-term borrowers confident they can repay and reclaim their collateral
diagnosis: La Familia Pawn & Jewelry is best for consumers in Florida, Arkansas, or Puerto Rico who need immediate cash against an owned asset and have limited access to traditional credit. The main caveat is that pawn loan rates are high and not disclosed upfront — this is a short-term emergency cash tool, not a cheap borrowing option.
services: Outright purchase of customer items (tools, electronics, firearms, bikes, instruments)
Gold and jewelry buying and selling
Firearms pawn loans and outright purchase
Free layaway program (10% down, no fees)
Loyalty rewards program with redeemable points
Mobile app for loan management and payments
meta_description: LA Familia Pawn and Jewelry at 3615 W Vine St, Kissimmee, FL. Fast loans and jewelry sales Mon-Fri 9-7, Sat 9-6.
